name: What mistakes to avoid in Perplexity infringement claim?
description: Register works, block bots, act fast.[1]

mainEntity.name: What mistakes to avoid in Perplexity infringement claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Register works, block bots, act fast.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Don't delay (laches), fail to register copyrights timely, or ignore outputs.[1][6] Key: block bots early, register pre-suit.[1] No public shaming pre-notice. Precision wins.
